greetings.cold: The reporter. Ferris Mott has been misquoted before, you know. Twice. In two counties.
greetings.neutral: Psst. Reporter. You have the look of a man who knows things. Ferris Mott also knows things.
greetings.warm: Ah! The only journalist Ferris Mott trusts. Sit. Whisper. The walls have opinions.

etiquette.note: Conspiratorial whisper at all times, even ordering soup. Third person when excited. The tail is 'heritage couture' — compliment it and lose ten minutes.
